column1: I love the dashboard. It is clean, fast, and the export button is exactly where I expect it.
The upload failed twice and I almost lost my file. This is urgent because I need to send the report today.
Pricing is fair, but the onboarding email could explain the first steps more clearly.
The webhook replay feature saved me a lot of debugging time. Really useful.
I was charged but cannot access the dashboard. Please help immediately.
The UI looks premium, but some Spanish labels and English labels are mixed.
Bulk import worked well for my support tickets.
The product is promising, but I need better examples before I can pitch it to my team.
